---
title: "Newsletter"
description: "Posts by [our team](../team.qmd)."
image: ../cover.png
repo-actions: false
sidebar: false
search: false
toc: false
listing:
  id: blog-listings
  contents:
    - blogs.yml
    - "posts/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [date, title]
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  categories: false
  date-format: "MMM D, YYYY"
  feed: true
---

::: {#blog-listings}
:::
